mainEntity.name: How much compensation can I get for a broken leg from a site accident in St. George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Compensation includes all medical expenses, roughly 66% of lost wages, and a potential permanent disability settlement based on your impairment rating. Third-party claims can add pain and suffering damages.
